description: Fix carousel cloni senza event listener + sync stato

userStories.title: Fix: cloni del carousel non rispondono ai click
userStories.description: As a visitor, clicking on a cloned card should open Read more and pause the carousel, exactly like the originals.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace the per-element card-toggle listeners (document.querySelectorAll('.card-toggle').forEach) with event delegation on the carousel element itself
Replace the per-element card-thumb listeners with event delegation on the carousel element

When a card-toggle is clicked (open or close), also sync the twin card: find all cards in the carousel, get the clicked card's index, compute twinIndex = index < origCount ? index + origCount : index - origCount, and apply the same open/close state to the twin card silently (without re-triggering events)
window.cardOpen is set to true when ANY card opens, false only when ALL cards are closed (check if any card-toggle has aria-expanded=true after the action)
Remove the separate card-thumb click block — handle thumb clicks via delegation on carousel too
userStories.notes: Root cause: cloning (line ~918, script block 2) happens AFTER event listeners are attached (script block 1, lines 872-907). Delegation fixes this because the listener is on the carousel container which exists before cloning. origCount = 4 (the original 4 cards). The twin sync must update: hidden attr, is-open class, aria-expanded, button text and arrow — but NOT trigger click() to avoid infinite loop.
